title: Isotrema jianfenglingense
intro: Isotrema jianfenglingense, also known as Jianfengling Isotrema, is a plant species belonging to the YSL (Yunnan-Southern Sichuan-Liangshan) clade of the Blumea genus. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in China, for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The bioactive constituents of Isotrema jianfenglingense include sesquiterpenoids, diterpenoids, and flavonoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Isotrema jianfenglingense is often prepared into decoctions, infusions, or dried powders, which are used to treat various health conditions, including hypertension, fever, and respiratory infections.
